sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Stade Brestois has shown mixed results, with only one win in their last five matches while conceding goals consistently. Conversely, Toulouse is on a stronger run, with notable victories including a 5-1 thrashing of Nice.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head
sections.text: In their last two matchups, Toulouse has maintained a clear advantage, with a 2-0 victory in their last meeting, suggesting they have the upper hand going into this match.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: For Brest, midfielders Doumbia and Chotard will be crucial, while Toulouse's Gboho and Cresswell have been standout performers recently, contributing significantly to their goal tally.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Toulouse's recent form and head-to-head performance, they are favored to win, though Brest will aim to leverage home advantage.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, Toulouse leads Stade Brestois 2-0, showcasing a strong performance away from home. The away team capitalized on their chances effectively, with goals by Pape Diop and Yann Gboho. Brestois struggled to convert their possession into tangible results.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Home team performance
halftimeSections.text: Stade Brestois demonstrated a balanced possession rate of 49%, reflecting their ability to maintain the ball. However, their attacking efforts have been inadequate; they created only 1 shot on target and had no corner kicks. Despite entering the final third frequently, their lack of efficiency in the penalty area is concerning.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Away team dominance
halftimeSections.text: Toulouse's statistics reveal a more effective offensive strategy, with 4 shots on target and significant influence in the final third with 14 entries. Their average duels won is lower compared to Brestois, yet they have compensated for this with their tactical execution and ability to capitalize on scoring opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum shifts
halftimeSections.text: The attack momentum shifted in favor of Toulouse throughout the first half, particularly after their second goal. Brestois showed moments of pressure, especially after gaining an attacking spell in the early minutes, yet they could not sustain this momentum. Toulouse's ability to regain control during critical phases allowed them to dictate the tempo of the game.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: In the second half, Brestois will need to increase their attacking threat and convert possession into meaningful chances if they aim to mount a comeback. Conversely, Toulouse can focus on maintaining their lead, potentially looking to counterattack if Brestois pushes forward too aggressively.
